sellerGoal: Expand seats, protect list price, and avoid a multi-year price freeze.
buyerStakeholders: Director of Procurement: pushing for 15% off and a 2-year price freeze
VP Operations: internal champion, needs the analytics module before Q4 audit
IT Security: requires SSO/SCIM before expansion seats can activate

commercialPolicy.discountFloor: Do not exceed 10% without VP Sales approval.
commercialPolicy.preferredConcession: Ramped annual pricing plus a 3-month free analytics module.
commercialPolicy.priceLock: Avoid multi-year price freezes; cap any lock at 5% annual uplift.

legalPolicy.redFlag: A multi-year price freeze removes annual uplift and compounds margin loss.
legalPolicy.safeCounter: 24-month term with capped 5% annual uplift and mutual termination-for-convenience.
